result.stdout:
The Dolittle CLI tool

Usage: dolittle [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  runtime       Manage a Runtime

Run 'dolittle [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
The Dolittle CLI tool

Usage: dolittle [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  runtime       Manage a Runtime

Run 'dolittle [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Manage a Runtime

Usage: dolittle runtime [command] [options]

Options:
  --runtime      The <host[:port]> to use to connect to the management endpoint
                 of a Runtime
  -o|--output    The output type.
                 Allowed values are: Table, Json.
                 Default value is: Table.
  -w|--wide      Whether the table output is wide or not.
  -?|-h|--help   Show help information.

Commands:
  aggregates     Manage Aggregates
  config         Gets the configuration yaml
  eventhandlers  Manage Event Handlers
  eventtypes     Manage Event Types

Run 'runtime [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Manage Aggregates

Usage: dolittle runtime aggregates [command] [options]

Options:
  --runtime     The <host[:port]> to use to connect to the management endpoint
                of a Runtime
  -o|--output   The output type.
                Allowed values are: Table, Json.
                Default value is: Table.
  -w|--wide     Whether the table output is wide or not.
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  events        Gets all committed aggregate events for an aggregate root
                instance. When viewing in table mode it will only show the last
                10 events
  get           Gets a registered Aggregate Root
  list          Lists all registered Aggregate Roots

Run 'aggregates [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Gets all committed aggregate events for an aggregate root instance. When viewing in table mode it will only show the last 10 events

Usage: dolittle runtime aggregates events [options] <AggregateRootIdentifier> <EventSourceId>

Arguments:
  AggregateRootIdentifier  The Aggregate Root identifier of the Aggregate Root
                           to get committed aggregate events for.
  EventSourceId            The Event Source Id of the Aggregate Root Instance to
                           get committed aggregate events for.

Options:
  --tenant                 Only show committed aggregate events for the
                           specified Tenant. Defaults to the development Tenant
                           Default value is:
                           445f8ea8-1a6f-40d7-b2fc-796dba92dc44.
  --runtime                The <host[:port]> to use to connect to the management
                           endpoint of a Runtime
  -o|--output              The output type.
                           Allowed values are: Table, Json.
                           Default value is: Table.
  -w|--wide                Whether the table output is wide or not.
  -?|-h|--help             Show help information.

result.stdout:
Manage Event Handlers

Usage: dolittle runtime eventhandlers [command] [options]

Options:
  --runtime     The <host[:port]> to use to connect to the management endpoint
                of a Runtime
  -o|--output   The output type.
                Allowed values are: Table, Json.
                Default value is: Table.
  -w|--wide     Whether the table output is wide or not.
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  get           Gets a running Event Handler
  list          List all running Event Handlers
  replay        Make an Event Handler reprocess events

Run 'eventhandlers [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Gets a running Event Handler

Usage: dolittle runtime eventhandlers get [options] <EventHandlerIdentifier>

Arguments:
  EventHandlerIdentifier  The Event Handler identifier of the Event Handler to
                          get details for

Options:
  --tenant                Only show Event Handler information for the specified
                          Tenant
  --runtime               The <host[:port]> to use to connect to the management
                          endpoint of a Runtime
  -o|--output             The output type.
                          Allowed values are: Table, Json.
                          Default value is: Table.
  -w|--wide               Whether the table output is wide or not.
  -?|-h|--help            Show help information.

result.stdout:
Make an Event Handler reprocess events

Usage: dolittle runtime eventhandlers replay [command] [options]

Options:
  --runtime     The <host[:port]> to use to connect to the management endpoint
                of a Runtime
  -o|--output   The output type.
                Allowed values are: Table, Json.
                Default value is: Table.
  -w|--wide     Whether the table output is wide or not.
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  all           Make an Event Handler reprocess all events
  from          Make an Event Handler reprocess events from a specific position
                for a tenant

Run 'replay [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Make an Event Handler reprocess all events

Usage: dolittle runtime eventhandlers replay all [options] <EventHandlerIdentifier>

Arguments:
  EventHandlerIdentifier  The Event Handler identifier of the Event Handler to
                          replay

Options:
  --runtime               The <host[:port]> to use to connect to the management
                          endpoint of a Runtime
  -o|--output             The output type.
                          Allowed values are: Table, Json.
                          Default value is: Table.
  -w|--wide               Whether the table output is wide or not.

result.stdout:
Make an Event Handler reprocess events from a specific position for a tenant

Usage: dolittle runtime eventhandlers replay from [options] <EventHandlerIdentifier> <Position>

Arguments:
  EventHandlerIdentifier  The Event Handler identifier of the Event Handler to
                          replay
  Position                The position to start replaying events from.

Options:
  --tenant                The tenant to replay events for. Defaults to the
                          development tenant.
  --runtime               The <host[:port]> to use to connect to the management
                          endpoint of a Runtime
  -o|--output             The output type.
                          Allowed values are: Table, Json.
                          Default value is: Table.
  -w|--wide               Whether the table output is wide or not.
  -?|-h|--help            Show help information.

commands.payload:
Make an Event Handler reprocess events from a specific position for a tenant

Usage: dolittle runtime eventhandlers replay from [options] <EventHandlerIdentifier> <Position>

Arguments:
  EventHandlerIdentifier  The Event Handler identifier of the Event Handler to
                          replay
  Position                The position to start replaying events from.

Options:
  --tenant                The tenant to replay events for. Defaults to the
                          development tenant.
  --runtime               The <host[:port]> to use to connect to the management
                          endpoint of a Runtime
  -o|--output             The output type.
                          Allowed values are: Table, Json.
                          Default value is: Table.
  -w|--wide               Whether the table output is wide or not.
  -?|-h|--help            Show help information.
